title: RAC (Requirements as Code) artifact frontmatter envelope
description: The YAML frontmatter envelope of one RAC artifact, per SPEC.md section 6.3. Mirrors the reference validator (rac-core core/frontmatter.py) exactly: the field set is closed (an unknown field is the blocking finding invalid-metadata-field), schema_version is required whenever a frontmatter block is present, and a document with no frontmatter block at all is legal (the legacy form; that case is outside this schema). Duplicate keys, YAML aliases, nesting deeper than 32 levels, and blocks over 64 KiB are rejected by the parser before schema validation applies.

schema_version.description: The per-artifact envelope schema version. Required when frontmatter is present. Must be an integer (booleans are rejected) in the supported set; anything else is the blocking finding unsupported-schema-version.

id.description: The canonical artifact identifier: <repository key>-<12-char Crockford base32 suffix (no I/L/O/U)>. Matched case-insensitively and normalized to uppercase; a non-matching value is the blocking finding invalid-id-syntax. SPEC.md section 6.4.

type.description: The declared artifact type. Closed set (SPEC.md section 6.1); an unregistered value is the blocking finding invalid-metadata-field.

relationships.description: RESERVED (SPEC.md section 8.6): relationship kind -> list of artifact-ID strings. Shape-validated only; the reference validator does not check kinds against the relationship vocabulary and does not yet consume this field — body relationship sections remain authoritative.

tags.description: Optional descriptive labels (OKF-reserved field): a list of non-empty strings. A malformed shape is the blocking finding invalid-metadata-field.
